"'''What Goes Up...'''" is a story from the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5]]''. It was written and illustrated by the [[Fillbach Brothers]] and colored by [[Lee Evandon]].

==Plot summary==
[[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]] investigate a deserted [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] outpost in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]]. After discovering the base to be empty (and finding the remains of countless [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]), Secura goes out scouting where she encounters a [[Unidentified B1 battle droid (Endor)|lone battle droid]]. Disposing its appendages, Secura is caught unaware by the native [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] and is shot with a tranquilizer dart. Waking up in a treehouse, Secura uses the battle droid as a translator, who sarcastically informs her that she is thought to be a forest spirit. As a spirit, it is her duty to vanquish the [[Beast in the Mouth of the Mountain]]. Secura, taking the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] along, complies. Reaching the cave, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] trips on a pile of bones, alerting the Beast to her presence. The Beast quickly impales the battle droid with its claw, leaving Secura free to work on collapsing parts of the ceiling upon the monster. Fulfilling her duty as the Ewok's spirit, the Jedi Master returns to the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Republic gunship]], where Bly is waiting. Dismissing her commander's worries, the pair, along with their squadron, heads to [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]]. As the squadron flies away, the [[Unidentified Ewok chief|Ewok chief]], who has recovered the droid's head as a totem, paints a memorial of Aayla's victory.
